scripts.docker-up: sh -c 'ENV_FILE=.env; if [ ! -f "$ENV_FILE" ]; then ENV_FILE=.env.example; fi; docker compose --env-file "$ENV_FILE" -f infra/docker/compose.core.yml --profile core up -d --build'
scripts.docker-down: sh -c 'ENV_FILE=.env; if [ ! -f "$ENV_FILE" ]; then ENV_FILE=.env.example; fi; docker compose --env-file "$ENV_FILE" -f infra/docker/compose.core.yml --profile core --profile vision-cpu --profile vision-gpu --profile nvr-local down --remove-orphans'
scripts.logs: sh -c 'ENV_FILE=.env; if [ ! -f "$ENV_FILE" ]; then ENV_FILE=.env.example; fi; docker compose --env-file "$ENV_FILE" -f infra/docker/compose.core.yml --profile core logs -f --tail=200'
scripts.seed: sh -c 'ENV_FILE=.env; if [ ! -f "$ENV_FILE" ]; then ENV_FILE=.env.example; fi; docker compose --env-file "$ENV_FILE" -f infra/docker/compose.core.yml --profile core run --rm minio-bootstrap'
